docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2015 BY CYNTHIA M. LEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNS, JON ON BEHALF OF RECIPROCAL REALITY LLC OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLOMONT, DAVID INDIVIDUALLY AND THE NINE ASSOCIATES LLC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
